g.text: — Floppy Recovery Toolkit for Sony Mavica
Start here — walks you through every step
Recover files with original Mavica names
Extract JPEGs from damaged/raw disk images
Add camera model, date, and lens data to EXIF
Match photos to GPS tracks from a logger
Interactive wizard — what's wrong with my floppy?
Find the faulty camera, disk, or drive
Windows / macOS / Linux | ? for help | q to quit
